headline: Xcel Energy Files Prospectus To Offer And Sell Up To $4.3B Of Common Stock

raw.headline: Xcel Energy Files Prospectus To Offer And Sell Up To $4.3B Of Common Stock

headline: Xcel Energy Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Xcel Energy (NASDAQ:XEL) reported first-quarter 2026 GAAP earnings of $0.89 per share and ongoing earnings of $0.91 per share, excluding two non-recurring items tied to a Prairie Island outage-related disallowance and updated insurance proceeds associated with Marshall Fire litigation. Vice Preside
